disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The retracted foreskin cannot be brought forward over the head of the penis and has been stuck since washing about two hours ago
trigger_question_examples: What happened just before this started?
Can you pull the skin back forward over the head?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin got pulled back while I was washing about two hours ago and now it won't go forward again — it's stuck behind the head.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The head of the penis is progressively swollen, tense and changing colour toward dusky purple — a marker of compromised blood flow
trigger_question_examples: What colour is the head of the penis now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The head is really swollen and tight and it's going a dark purple colour, and it's been getting worse over the last couple of hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, escalating pain with inability to tolerate any contact to the area
trigger_question_examples: Can you tolerate anything touching it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The pain is unbearable — I can't have anything touch it, not even clothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is still able to pass urine — acute urinary retention has not yet developed
trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass urine?
Have you been unable to wee at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still wee, that part's okay so far.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing tight, scarred foreskin and recurrent episodes of soreness/infection under the foreskin (predisposing scarred preputial ring)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had problems with the foreskin before?
Has the skin always been tight or scarred?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, the skin's always been tight and looks a bit white and scarred, and I keep getting soreness and infections under there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A cold compress was applied by the carer — a well-meant but counterproductive measure that can worsen ischaemia
trigger_question_examples: Has anything been done to it so far?
Has anyone put anything on it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The support worker put a cold pack on it to try to help, but it hasn't made any difference.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The head of the penis has NOT turned black and is not weeping foul-smelling fluid — full necrosis has not yet occurred (time-critical window still open)
trigger_question_examples: Has the head gone black anywhere, or is there any smelly discharge?
Is any part of the skin turning black or breaking down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's dark purple but it hasn't gone black and there's no smell or discharge — it just looks swollen and bruised.
